subject: [PATCH v2 088/110] jffs2: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is addressing a concern about the use of %llu/%llx format strings in jffs2, specifically that they are not being used consistently throughout the code. The author explains that they have already replaced all uses of PRIino with the concrete format strings and provides patch output to demonstrate this.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the JFFS2 file system to use explicit format strings instead of the PRIino macro, which has been removed since inode numbers are now u64 type. The changes affect various debug messages in jffs2's dir.c, file.c, and fs.c files. This update ensures that the code is consistent with the current inode number type and avoids potential issues related to format string usage.
